hooks.command: FILE=$(python3 -c "import os,json; print(json.loads(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT','{}')).get('file_path',''))"); case "$FILE" in *.rs) (cd src-tauri && cargo check 2>&1) ;; esac
FILE=$(python3 -c "import os,json; print(json.loads(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT','{}')).get('file_path',''))"); case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.vue|*.json) pnpm biome check --write "$FILE" 2>&1 ;; esac
